title: 10 Things a Governed Man Does Differently
caption:
Governance isn't a personality trait. It's a set of choices you make before the moment arrives.

The governed man doesn't white-knuckle his impulses in the heat — he already decided. Phone face-down before he sleeps. Word before the feed. Hard thing before the easy one. He apologizes the same day. He has one man who knows all of it.

None of these are dramatic. None of them trend. But they compound, and that compounding is what makes the difference between a man who's still reacting to his life and a man who's actually running it.

Self-mastery is the foundation of everything else. A man who can govern himself can be trusted with everything else. A man who can't is a city with no walls.

Save this. Then pick one.

#faith #christianmen #discipline #selfmastery #godlymen #manofgod #thework #masculinity #christianity #habits
theme: He runs his life — his impulses don't control him.
